title: Schema-Comparison Conformance Fixture
description: JSON Schema describing the format of a schema-comparison conformance fixture file: a pair of embedded OpenBindings interface documents compared under the schema-comparison profile, with the expected summary verdict.

description.description: Human-readable statement of the rule this fixture pins, ideally byte-faithful to the schema-comparison profile's prose.

mode.description: Comparison mode. 'subsume': pair operations across the two documents and run the directional compatibility check on the direction's schemas, collapsing per-operation verdicts by dominance (indeterminate > incompatible > compatible). 'identical': normalize both sides' schemas per paired operation and compare their RFC 8785 canonical strings ('compatible' asserts they are identical, 'incompatible' asserts they differ).

profile.description: The comparison profile the fixture is authored against (the schema-comparison profile's identifier).

verdict.description: The collapsed summary verdict a conforming implementation must reach. Must equal the manifest entry's verdict.

interfaceDocument.description: A complete, valid OpenBindings interface document, embedded inline (left = target/contract side, right = candidate side). CI validates these against the OBI meta-schema. Operation input/output schemas may use the object form, the boolean form, or be absent (unspecified).
